topic: How many people judge a business's credibility by its website
caption:
75% of customers have already decided if they trust you.
Before they call. Before they walk in.

copy.headline: of people judge credibility by your website
copy.body: Stanford Web Credibility Research found 75% of consumers admit to judging a business's credibility based on its website design.
